title: AE2 Legible Presses
description: Simple resource pack for AE2 that re-textures the 'press' items to match the singular resource type each is used with.
body:
If you've ever had to check JEI 6 times while crafting AE2 circuits because the press items are nearly identical, then this resource pack is for you!

Simply re-textures the AE2 'press' items to reflect the material they're used with.

- Calculation -> Certus Quartz
- Engineering -> Diamond
- Logic       -> Gold
- Silicon     -> ...Silicon?


I made this for myself _~~out of spite~~_ and thought someone else might appreciate it! :>


Note: I have not tested this pack on versions other than MC: 1.20.1, and AE2: forge-15.4.10
That said, it will probably work on different versions reguardless of what the resource pack menu will tell you.
